generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder behind the gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) for motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ) from motor current and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredInputCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for model-based systems engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights from SysML BDD and IBD"
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction parameters for real-time control adjustments"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of robot motion accuracy through comparison of simulated and measured data"
]

instance SemanticInteroperabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic interoperability insights from AAS metadata integration"
]

instance RealTimeDataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming insights via MQTT protocol"
]

instance RobotControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Robot control insights from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML BDD and IBD"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models with live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of integrated data traces in a unified dashboard to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of AAS metadata for semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:provides SemanticInteroperabilityInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataStreamingInsight
]

instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control of robot using Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides RobotControlInsight
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG, consisting of permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for immediate friction model identification and motion control adjustments, with live measurements synchronized to the physical system's operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of the physical robot's first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox), sensor data streams, SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and a unified dashboard for visualization, forming a passive digital shadow with one-way data flow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, utilizing live operational data from the physical robot during active use for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated data (from friction models) and measured data to identify friction loss, with multi-physics-aware integration of white-box and black-box models for enhanced accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, velocity, acceleration) from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic interoperability and SysML for model-based systems engineering as per Industry 4.0 standards."
]
